originalTitle: Top Fed official warns ‘hot’ inflation could trigger rate rise
summary: Christopher Waller says a further elevated reading may prompt central bank to tighten policy
content: Christopher Waller says a further elevated reading may prompt central bank to tighten policy
chineseTitle: 美联储高级官员警告“热”通胀可能引发加息
chineseSummary: 克里斯托弗·沃勒表示，进一步升高的数据可能会促使央行收紧政策
chineseContent: 克里斯托弗·沃勒表示，进一步升高的数据可能会促使央行收紧政策
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
